about.title: Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.
paragraphs: RECPL is a premier engineering consultancy firm specialising in Non-Destructive Testing, Third Party Inspection, Structural Audits, and industrial supply solutions. With a PhD-led leadership team and decades of field expertise, we serve India's most demanding industrial and government clients.
Our mission is simple: deliver uncompromising quality, safety, and compliance — every project, every time.

image.alt: RECPL engineers conducting structural audit work

services.title: Our Core Services
services.description: End-to-end engineering solutions — from inspection to supply.

items.title: Consultancy
items.description: Expert engineering consultancy for design review, fitness-for-service, and remaining life assessment of critical assets.

items.title: Non-Destructive Testing
items.description: UT, RT, MPT, DPT and advanced NDT methods for weld integrity, corrosion mapping, and material characterisation.

items.title: Third Party Inspection
items.description: Independent QA/QC inspection and certification services ensuring compliance with national and international codes.

items.title: Supply
items.description: Industrial supply of testing equipment, consumables, and calibration instruments for NDT and inspection needs.

reasons.title: Why Choose Us
reasons.description: Trusted by industries and government bodies across India.

items.title: Certified Experts
items.description: ASNT, ISNT, and Factory Act certified professionals with deep domain expertise.

items.title: PhD-Led Team
items.description: Leadership backed by doctoral-level research in material science and structural engineering.

items.title: End-to-End Solutions
items.description: From initial consultation to final report — comprehensive engineering services under one roof.

items.title: Compliance-Driven
items.description: Every engagement aligned with IS, ASME, AWS, API, and other national/international standards.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.description: Delivering safety and compliance across India's critical infrastructure sectors.

cta.description: Get in touch with our team of certified engineers today. We're ready to help.
